hooks.command: echo 'RESUME (contradictionchecker, as of 2026-05-31). State: PRs #60-#70 all merged to main; corpus isolation + OCR fallback both done. OCR feature: UnstructuredLoader auto-escalates strategy=fast to strategy=hi_res (Tesseract via unstructured) when a multi-page non-trivial PDF returns near-empty text. Triple guard (ocr_enabled + strategy=fast + .pdf), cheap looks_empty pre-check before pypdf/stat, hi_res call wrapped in try/except so missing Tesseract cannot abort corpus walk (records ocr_error event). Disable via Config.ocr_enabled=False or --no-ocr (tri-state: omitted respects config, --ocr/--no-ocr override). Audit at <data_dir>/ocr_events.jsonl. ADR-0014. --corpus is REQUIRED on ingest/check/estimate-cost/export/store reidentify-orgs (interactive picker on TTY; consistency-check corpus list --db <path> to see what is there). Judge/extractor default to Moonshot/Kimi (kimi-k2.6); needs MOONSHOT_API_KEY in gitignored .env; run from repo root. Atkins corpus (2026-05-30): 2 of 5 PDFs ingested under old code (8645 assertions); 3 amendments were scanned images that silently collapsed into sentinel row. With OCR now shipped, a clean re-ingest under --corpus atkins-v2 would exercise the hi_res path and recover those 3 docs (requires apt install tesseract-ocr + first-use ~500 MB model download). FCS UCR Call Report (text PDF, 250 pages) ingested 2026-05-31 as OCR negative-path verification: 4343 assertions, 0 ocr_events (predicate correctly returned False on abundant text). Competitive intel (verified WebSearch 2026-05-30): Definely Cascade (Aug 2025) is the direct competitor for drafting-time edit-consequence detection in MS Word. Surviving wedge Cascade does NOT cover: BACKWARD AUDIT of static corpora (DD inheritance, compliance review, non-legal verticals like policy/regs/technical docs). Remaining top commercial blockers if pursued: (1) publish real CONTRADOC precision/recall on README, (2) --max-cost hard ceiling + default estimates to Moonshot pricing (estimate-cost should also account for OCR escalation cost on image-heavy corpora), (3) flip pairwise detector to opt-in (own eval 2026-05-21 shows near-zero yield on legal prose; definition detector is the lever), (4) PyPI release + pipx launcher. Brand split (repo contradictionchecker / package consistency-checker / product CrossCheck) should consolidate. Full background in MEMORY.md.'
